gt_sql: SELECT T3.race FROM superhero AS T1 INNER JOIN hero_attribute AS T2 ON T1.id = T2.hero_id INNER JOIN race AS T3 ON T1.race_id = T3.id ORDER BY T2.attribute_value DESC LIMIT 1
pred_sql:
SELECT r.race
FROM superhero s
JOIN hero_attribute ha ON s.id = ha.hero_id
JOIN race r ON s.race_id = r.id
ORDER BY ha.attribute_value DESC
LIMIT 1;
question: What is the race of the superhero with maximum attribute value?
